Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class Expression

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.Formula<Expression>
org.eventb.core.ast.Expression
Direct Known Subclasses:
AssociativeExpression, AtomicExpression, BinaryExpression, BoolExpression, ExtendedExpression, Identifier, IntegerLiteral, QuantifiedExpression, SetExtension, UnaryExpression
public abstract class Expression extends Formula<Expression>
Common class for event-B expressions. TODO: document Expression.
Since:
1.0

  • Field Details

    • type

      private Type type

  • Constructor Details

    • Expression

      protected Expression(int tag, FormulaFactory ff, SourceLocation location, int hashCode)
      Creates a new expression with the specified tag and source location.
      Parameters:
      tag - node tag of this expression
      ff - the formula factory used to build this expression
      location - source location of this expression
      hashCode - combined hash code for children
      Since:
      3.0

  • Method Details

    • synthesizeType

      protected abstract void synthesizeType(Type givenType)
      Since:
      3.0

    • mergeGivenTypes

      protected final boolean mergeGivenTypes(Type aType)
      Adds the free identifiers for the GivenTypes occurring in the given type into the free identifier cache. Returns whether these given types are compatible with the current contents of the cache.

      Must be called only by synthesizeType().

      Parameters:
      aType - the type we are about to set on this formula
      Returns:
      true iff the identifier cache is still type-checked
      Since:
      3.0

    • setFinalType

      protected final void setFinalType(Type synType, Type proposedType)

    • getType

      public final Type getType()
      Returns the type of this expression if it is type-checked, or null otherwise. Once the type of this expression is known, it will never change.
      Returns:
      the type of this expression or null
      See Also:
      • Formula.isTypeChecked()

    • getTypedThis

      protected final Expression getTypedThis()
      Specified by:
      getTypedThis in class Formula<Expression>

    • getTypeName

      protected final String getTypeName()

    • equalsInternal

      protected final boolean equalsInternal(Formula<?> formula)
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Tells whether two formulae are equal modulo alpha-conversion. In other terms, whether the two formulae have the same tree, where the names of bound identifier declarations are ignored. Tags are already known to be the same. This method must only be called by Formula.equals(Object), and never directly by recursive calls.
      Specified by:
      equalsInternal in class Formula<Expression>
      Parameters:
      formula - the formula to be compared to
      Returns:
      true if both objects are equal

    • equalsInternalExpr

      abstract boolean equalsInternalExpr(Expression other)

    • setTemporaryType

      protected final void setTemporaryType(Type type, TypeCheckResult result)
      Sets a temporary type for this expression. This method should only be used by method Formula.typeCheck(ITypeEnvironment).

      If the formula has already been type-checked, we just verify that the given type is unifiable with the already set type.

      Parameters:
      type - the type of the formula

    • isATypeExpression

      public boolean isATypeExpression()
      Returns whether this expression denotes a type.
      Returns:
      true iff this expression denotes a type.

    • toType

      public Type toType()
      Returns the type corresponding to this type-checked expression.

      The returned type is not the type of this expression.

      Returns:
      the type represented by this expression
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - when this expression doesn't denote a type or is not type-checked
      Since:
      2.0
      See Also:
      • Type.toExpression()
      • isATypeExpression()

    • typeCheck

      public final ITypeCheckResult typeCheck(ITypeEnvironment environment, Type expectedType)
      Statically type-checks this expression, whose expected type is known.

      Returns the TypeCheckResult containing all the informations about the type-check run.

      Parameters:
      environment - an initial type environment
      expectedType - expected type of this expression
      Returns:
      the result of the type checker
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this formula is not well-formed
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given type or type environment has been built with a different formula factory
      See Also:
      • Formula.isWellFormed()

    • solveType

      protected final void solveType(TypeUnifier unifier)
      Description copied from class: Formula
      Internal method used by the type-checker to set the type of the formula after a type-check has been executed.
      Specified by:
      solveType in class Formula<Expression>
      Parameters:
      unifier - a type unifier

    • solveChildrenTypes

      protected abstract void solveChildrenTypes(TypeUnifier unifier)
      Since:
      3.0

    • getCheckedReplacement

      protected final Expression getCheckedReplacement(SingleRewriter rewriter)
      Specified by:
      getCheckedReplacement in class Formula<Expression>
